description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bags with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift   to your season wardrobe.  Product Details Khaki and dark brown upper with a wide fabric shoulder strap Has satchel style two buckling details that have magnetic button closures underneath Two pockets under the flap Has a fabric inner with a zipped pocket Material and Care Canvas Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size  Height: 31 cm  Width: 40 cm  Depth: 13 cm
